titleStmt.title: SII 27.456: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 456. (A.R. No. 220 of 1931-32.) NALLŪRUPALLE, (HAMLET OF BAṆḌLAPALLE), PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone in the sluice of the tank.

This record, in late characters, refers to the allotment of six portions of produce of the land below the tank to god Agatinata (Agastya-nātha) and the remaining one portion to Taṁbiseṭi who constructed the tank at Nalluru-haḷi under the direction of Timmaya Samarasa what was the karaṇika of the temple. The allotment was made by the latter.
It is dated the cyclic year Plavaṅga, Chaitra śu. 5; the details are insufficient for verification.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
palavaṁga saṁvastarāda
caitra ssudha 5 lu śrī
matu Agattinata dēvara
karnika tiṁmaya samarasanu
bayira perāmaḷa maga
taṁbi seṭṭiyarige nallu
ruhaḷiya kuṁṭeyanu
nā niṁma kaiyalu
karuṇana kaṭida saṁma
ṁda I kuṁṭeya keḷage
Uṁṭāda gadeyanu A

gattenata dēvarige A
rubaga kaṭugoḍage
taṁbi seṭige voṁ
du bagavanu ninage bā
da surivaruḷaṭṭu kāla
lu seḍaseUḷavaru Eṁ
du koṭa kaṭagoḍage
yi kaṭugo
ḍage Aru tapidadu
taṁma tayitaṁdeyanu
vaṇarasiyalu koṁda
papadali hōguvaru
gōvakoṁda papadali hō
guvaruThe last line is built
Digital edition of SII 27.456 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
